tweets.text: 🚀 Excited to announce the initial release of Commit Content Tracker! An AI-powered tool that turns your GitHub commits & PRs into engaging X threads automatically. Built with TypeScript, running serverlessly on GitHub Actions. Let’s dive in! 👇 #DevTools

🔗 It integrates with GitHub webhooks to catch push & PR events in real-time. No manual effort—just code, commit, and watch the magic happen. Perfect for devs who want to share their work effortlessly. 🛠️
🧠 Powered by Grok API, it generates human-like X content. Plus, a Telegram bot lets you review drafts before posting. Full control, zero stress. How cool is that? 😎

📢 Supports multi-project configs & publishes full threads on X. Whether you’re a solo dev or managing a team, this tool scales with you. Check it out: https://github.com/amitayks/commit-content-creatore/commit/2b5819b
What do you think? Could this save you time sharing your dev journey? Drop your thoughts or ideas below—I’d love to hear! 💬 #DevTools #Automation #AI #CommitContentTracker #GitHub #TypeScript
